description: Make is a visual automation platform for building and running workflows that connect apps, data, and AI systems. It lets users manage scenarios, integrations, and related account resources across Make-hosted zones.
summary: Make.com exposes a REST Make API, a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.make.com`, and a Make CLI; authentication is via Make API tokens, approved OAuth 2.0 clients, or MCP tokens depending on surface.
